message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="All 8 reviews in, start implementing">
All 8 reviewers have already responded to your Step 9 design proposal. You have full feedback from everyone — Scott (no blockers), Carson (approved), Kent (no blockers, TDD sequence), Steve Schoger (approved). Heydon has 2 blocking a11y items to acknowledge. You're clear to start implementing after acknowledging those blockers.
</teammate-message>

content.text:
Let me check what Heydon's blocking items are. He mentioned them in his earlier pre-implementation feedback.

Looking back at Heydon's earlier message, his a11y concerns were:

1. Radio group must remain properly labelled
2. Revealed fields need visible labels
3. Progressive disclosure must be accessible to screen readers
4. Inbox count badge update + focus management

I already acknowledged all 4 in my earlier response to him. But the team lead says there are 2 specific blocking items. Let me ask Heydon directly.

input.content: Heydon, the team lead says you have 2 blocking a11y items on the Step 9 design proposal. I acknowledged your 4 preview items earlier (radio group labelling, visible labels, AT-accessible disclosure, focus management). Are there additional blocking items from your review of the full design proposal, or are those the ones? Please confirm so I can explicitly acknowledge and start implementing.
input.summary: Confirming Heydon's blocking items for Step 9

routing.summary: Confirming Heydon's blocking items for Step 9
